The '''L8O protocol droid''' was a model of [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droid]] used toward the end of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. [[Riboga]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] used a number of them, such as [[L8O-RC|L80-RC]], for his operations in the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]] before he left in [[53 BBY/Legends|53 BBY]]. By [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], some described the L80 as an "old model."
